caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark vest with decorative trim, stands behind a microphone, performing in front of a brown slatted background. He is positioned in the center of the scene, singing or speaking into the microphone. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, including individuals with long brown and white hair, as they watch the performance. A purple graphic element containing the white text "ORCA" appears on the right side of the frame. The scene remains largely static across the sequence, with only slight variations in the man's facial expressions and posture as he continues his performance. The lighting is consistent, and the composition of the people and equipment remains unchanged throughout the clip.
